events.appearance_notes: High activity; A road is covered with white snow, and a black car drives into the left side and drifts around the corner out of view of the camera.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 10.1s, a road is covered with white snow, and a black car drives into the left side and drifts around the corner out of view of the camera.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the black car drove towards the road above and drifted into the camera. Then the car reversed and drove towards the road below.
events.event_text: From 10.1s to 33.5s, then the black car drove towards the road above and drifted into the camera. Then the car reversed and drove towards the road below.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A silver car drove up from the upper left side of the road. The silver car stopped on the side of the road and then drove to the road below. A truck below drove into the camera.
events.event_text: From 33.5s to 70.3s, a silver car drove up from the upper left side of the road. The silver car stopped on the side of the road and then drove to the road below. A truck below drove into the camera.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in black got off the truck and walked into the building on the right. Another man in black got off the truck and followed closely.
events.event_text: From 70.3s to 90.0s, a man in black got off the truck and walked into the building on the right. Another man in black got off the truck and followed closely.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A black car below quickly drove towards the road above, then stopped in front of the truck, and a silver car behind it stopped beside it.
events.event_text: From 90.0s to 114.1s, a black car below quickly drove towards the road above, then stopped in front of the truck, and a silver car behind it stopped beside it.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in black got out of a black car and walked into the building on the right. A man in black got out of a silver car and followed closely behind.
events.event_text: From 114.1s to 140.0s, a man in black got out of a black car and walked into the building on the right. A man in black got out of a silver car and followed closely behind.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Four men in black came out of the building and then walked to the truck to talk.
events.event_text: From 140.0s to 178.2s, four men in black came out of the building and then walked to the truck to talk.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; After the four people talked for a long time, two people entered the building again, and the other two entered the truck.
events.event_text: From 178.2s to 262.1s, after the four people talked for a long time, two people entered the building again, and the other two entered the truck.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A black car on the left drove towards the road below, followed by a black mini, followed by a white car, and the truck turned around and drove towards the road below.
events.event_text: From 262.1s to 324.0s, a black car on the left drove towards the road below, followed by a black mini, followed by a white car, and the truck turned around and drove towards the road below.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The screen switches to the road in the middle of the night, and there is no one on the road.
events.event_text: From 324.0s to 383.0s, the screen switches to the road in the middle of the night, and there is no one on the road.
